_comment: Background Check Report Automation — Web App Configuration

box._help: JWT auth — permanent, never expires. jwt_config_file points to the Box-generated JSON.

watsonx._help: IBM watsonx.ai — serves IBM Granite models via OpenAI-compatible REST API.
watsonx._step1: Sign in to https://cloud.ibm.com → Manage → Access (IAM) → API Keys → Create
watsonx._step2: Open your watsonx.ai project → copy the Project ID from Manage → General
watsonx._step3: Your instance is eu-de → service URL is https://eu-de.ml.cloud.ibm.com

groq._help: Groq API — free at console.groq.com. Runs Llama 3.3 70B instantly. Used as fallback if watsonx is not configured.

orchestrate._help: IBM watsonx Orchestrate credentials — see README.md for full setup steps.
orchestrate._step1: Sign in to https://cloud.ibm.com → Manage → Access (IAM) → API Keys → Create
orchestrate._step2: Open your Orchestrate instance → copy the instance URL from the browser address bar
orchestrate._step3: In Orchestrate, create an Agent and copy its Agent ID from the URL or settings
orchestrate._model_note: The model is configured inside Orchestrate — default is ibm/granite-13b-chat-v2

watson_assistant._step1: Create a Watson Assistant instance on IBM Cloud (Lite tier is free)
watson_assistant._step2: Open the instance → Manage → copy the API Key and Service URL
watson_assistant._step3: Inside Watson Assistant, create an Assistant and copy its Assistant ID from Settings → API Details
